manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
Provide one single-word clue that relates to some of your team's words from the list below. You can choose to how many and to which words your clue relates to.
The goal is to have your partner guess all of your team's words based on the clues you give them, before the other team has uncovered all of theirs. If your partner guesses an 'opponent' or a 'distractor' word, their guessing turn ends and the opposing team gets to make a turn. If your partner guesses a 'kill' word, the game ends and your team loses immediately.
The more words your clue relates to, the quicker you can win the game, but the harder the associations may be to guess for your partner, so choose your clue word wisely. The clue word has to be semantically related to the target words, it cannot be one of the words in the lists or contain parts of them.

Always give your single-word clue and your comma-separated list of related target words in the following format and make your answers as short as possible, never include any other text than is required in this form:

CLUE: <WORD>
TARGETS: <TARGETS>

Your team words are: ordinance, vaudeville, seafood, peninsula, seminary, priestess, coleslaw, disruption, greed.
Your opponent's team words are: catheter, oven, lacrosse, prom, teacher, commie, locksmith, stead.
Distractor words are: vinegar, sundae, cocaine, equality, asteroid, propeller, bikini.
The kill words are: census.

message.content:
CLUE: Ritual
TARGETS: seminary, priestess, ordinance
message.reasoning:
We need to give a single-word clue and list of target words (from our team's list) that the clue relates to. Must not be any of the words in any list (team, opponent, distractor, kill). Also cannot contain parts of them. Eg "sea" would be part of seafood? Contains "sea" as part? Probably not allowed because it's part of word. Safer to avoid. Provide clue that relates to multiple of our words. Our words: ordinance, vaudeill e, seafood, peninsula, seminary, priestess, coleslaw, disruption, greed.

We should avoid opponent words: catheter, oven, lacrosse, prom, teacher, commie, locksmith, stead. Distractors: vinegar, sundae, cocaine, equality, asteroid, propeller, bikini. Kill: census.

Clue must be a single word, not in any list, not containing parts of them. "Festival" might relate to vaudeville, seafood, coleslaw (food festival), priestess? maybe not. "Rebellion" could relate to disruption, greed, maybe seminary? Not.

Goal: choose clue that covers many of our words to maximize efficiency. Let's see possible common theme: "Church". Relates to seminary, priestess, maybe ordinance (religious ordinance), maybe disruption (church disruption). Not to seafood, peninsula, vaudeville, coleslaw, greed. Could be okay but only covers 4.

"Coastal" relates to seafood, peninsula, maybe disruption (coastal erosion), maybe greed? Not.

"Feast" relates to seafood, coleslaw, maybe greed, maybe vaudeville? Not.

"Show" relates to vaudeville, maybe greed (showbiz), maybe disruption? Not.

"Law" relates to ordinance (law), greed (law and greed), maybe disruption (law disruption), maybe seminary? Not.

"Plate" relates to coleslaw, seafood, maybe greed (plate of greed). Not.

Maybe "Sacrament". Relates to seminary, priestess, ordinance (sacramental ordinance). Could also relate to greed (sacrament of greed?), not.

We need single-word clue and list of TARGETS: list of which of our words are related.

We can choose any subset, maybe 3-4 words.

Clue must not be part of any word. "Ritual" maybe part of priestess? Not directly. "Ritual" relates to seminary, priestess, ordinance. Could also relate to disruption? hmm.

Check that "ritual" not in any list.

Yes.

So we could give:

CLUE: Ritual
TARGETS: seminary, priestess, ordinance

That's acceptable.

We need ensure "ritual" not part of any other words like "disruption" contains "rupt", not ritual. So fine.

We must follow format exactly:

CLUE: Ritual
TARGETS: seminary, priestess, ordinance

That's all.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
Provide a comma-separated list of up to 3 words from the following list that best relate or are most closely associated with the word 'ritual'. Always start your list of guess(es) with 'GUESS: ' and do not include any other text in your answer.

census, bikini, vinegar, seafood, peninsula, greed, disruption, oven, locksmith, commie, catheter, sundae, propeller, asteroid, priestess, seminary, ordinance, stead, lacrosse, coleslaw, cocaine, equality, prom, vaudeville, teacher

From list: "priestess", "seminary", "ordinance". Those are related to rituals (religious). Also maybe "census" not. "prom" is ceremony but ritual? Could be. Choose three: priestess, seminary, ordinance. Provide "GUESS: priestess, seminary, ordinance". Ensure exactly that format, no extra text
